zh.lifeSummary: 當James Radcliffe於1439年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾博爾頓時，他的父親James Radcliffe29歲，母親Agnes Euby30歲。他和Joan Neville至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1492年8月21日享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Radcliffe于1439年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾博爾頓时，他的父亲James Radcliffe29岁，母亲Agnes Euby30岁。他和Joan Neville至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1492年8月21日享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Radcliffe was born in 1439, in Bolton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, James Radcliffe, was 29 and his mother, Agnes Euby, was 30. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Joan Neville. He died on 21 August 1492, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Radcliffe est né en 1439, à Bolton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Radcliffe, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes Euby, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Joan Neville. Il est décédé le 21 août 1492, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Radcliffe 1439 in Bolton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Radcliffe 29 und seine Mutter Agnes Euby 30. Er hatte mit Joan Neville mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 21. August 1492 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Radcliffe è nato il nel 1439 nel Bolton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, James Radcliffe, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Euby, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Joan Neville. Morì il 21 agosto 1492, all'età di 53 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: James Radcliffe(이)가 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 볼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Radcliffe(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Euby(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Joan Neville(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1492년 8월 21일 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Radcliffe родился в 1439 г. в местности болтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени James Radcliffe было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Euby, 30. es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Radcliffe nació en 1439, en Bolton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, James Radcliffe, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes Euby, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Joan Neville. Murió el 21 de agosto de 1492, a la edad de 53 años.
